query:
SELECT
            p.id as "id!",
            p.name as "name!",
            p.original_name,
            p.image_path,
            COALESCE(
                (SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT bp.role::text)
                 FROM book_persons bp WHERE bp.person_id = p.id),
                ARRAY[]::text[]
            ) as "roles!",
            COUNT(DISTINCT bp2.book_id)::int as "book_count!",
            COALESCE(SUM(b.word_count), 0)::bigint as "total_word_count!"
        FROM persons p
        LEFT JOIN book_persons bp2 ON bp2.person_id = p.id
        LEFT JOIN books b ON b.id = bp2.book_id
        WHERE ($1 = '' OR p.name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR p.original_name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%')
          AND ($2 = '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM book_persons bp3 WHERE bp3.person_id = p.id AND bp3.role::text = $2))
        GROUP BY p.id
        ORDER BY book_count DESC, p.name ASC
        LIMIT $3
